/usr/bin/c++  -W -Wextra -Wall -Wsign-compare -Wshadow -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-strict-aliasing -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -momit-leaf-frame-pointer -march=native -Werror -fno-builtin-memcmp -Wno-array-bounds -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-rtti CMakeFiles/titan_manifest_dump.dir/tools/manifest_dump.cc.o -o titan_manifest_dump  -lsnappy -llz4 -lzstd libtitan.a rocksdb/librocksdb.a -lsnappy -llz4 -lzstd /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblz4.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so
